profile.bio: Marketplace-operated provider account for curated external API listings.

service.name: StableSocial Instagram API
service.tagline: Instagram profile, post, story, and search APIs for agents.
service.about: Discovery-only listing for StableSocial Instagram endpoints. Fast lists the provider metadata only; calls go directly to StableSocial.
service.promptIntro: Use this listing to discover StableSocial Instagram endpoints for profiles, posts, stories, highlights, and search workflows.
setupInstructions: Review the provider docs before calling any endpoint.
Authenticate directly with the provider as required by the provider.
Authenticate directly with StableSocial as required by the provider.
